title: SpaceX signs computing power deal with open-source AI startup Reflection worth up to $6.3 billion
summary_full: SpaceX has turned its Colossus data center into a commercial computing power platform, landing recent deals with Anthropic, Google and Cursor.
summary_public: SpaceX has turned its Colossus data center into a commercial computing power platform, landing recent deals with Anthropic, Google and Cursor.
